summary: Completed frontend-only testing of Lambda handler optimizations (Python 3.12 + SnapStart, SQS Provisioned Mode, Low-Level DDB, Eager Init). All features verified working: App loads correctly, Live Testing tab with warmup test + latency breakdown + bottleneck analysis renders correctly, Test History panel works with 10 entries, Optimizations tab displays new TIER 1/2/3 structure with proper colored badges and Expected Performance metrics + Deploy commands, all other tabs (Architecture, Terraform, Course, About Me) load correctly.
passed_tests: Live Testing tab: Warmup test executed successfully, results rendered with latency breakdown
Live Testing tab: Latency Distribution pie chart (<500ms, 500-1000ms, >1000ms) displayed
Live Testing tab: Statistics panel shows Min/Avg/Median/p95/Max/Throughput
Live Testing tab: Latency Breakdown stacked bar (data-testid='latency-stacked-bar') visible with 6 AWS service segments
Live Testing tab: Bottleneck Analysis (data-testid='bottleneck-analysis') shows primary bottleneck, concurrency status, recommendation
Live Testing tab: Test History panel (data-testid='test-history-panel') works - expanded and shows 10 entries
Optimizations tab (data-testid='optimizations-content'): TIER 1 (red badge) with 4 cards - Python 3.12+SnapStart, SQS Provisioned Mode, Low-Level DDB, Eager Init
Optimizations tab: TIER 2 (amber badge) with 3 cards - Parallel I/O, Batch Ops, Connection Pooling
Optimizations tab: TIER 3 (green badge) with 4 cards - orjson, ARM64, 1769MB, O(1) Time Bonus
Optimizations tab: Expected Performance section shows Cold Start (70% faster), Warm Latency (60% faster), Burst (80% faster), SQS Polling (87% faster)
Optimizations tab: Deploy Ultra Performance Edition section shows sam commands

success_rate.backend: Skipped per request - backend already verified (8/8 pytest tests pass)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Lambda handler optimizations frontend verified. Key data-testid attributes: test-history-panel, toggle-history-btn, history-table, latency-stacked-bar, bottleneck-analysis, optimizations-content, tab-test, tab-optimizations, tab-architecture, tab-terraform, tab-course, tab-about. Optimizations tab now shows TIER 1 (red), TIER 2 (amber), TIER 3 (green) with Before/After comparisons and improvement metrics. Expected Performance section shows latency improvements. Backend runs against real AWS with SQS, Lambda, DynamoDB.
